<?php /** * XHTML 1.1 Ruby Annotation Module, defines elements that indicate * short runs of text alongside base text for annotation or pronunciation. */ class HTMLPurifier_HTMLModule_Ruby extends HTMLPurifier_HTMLModule { /** * @type string */ public $name = 'Ruby'; /** * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config */ public function setup($config) { $this->addElement( 'ruby', 'Inline', 'Custom: ((rb, (rt | (rp, rt, rp))) | (rbc, rtc, rtc?))', 'Common' ); $this->addElement('rbc', false, 'Required: rb', 'Common'); $this->addElement('rtc', false, 'Required: rt', 'Common'); $rb = $this->addElement('rb', false, 'Inline', 'Common'); $rb->excludes = array('ruby' => true); $rt = $this->addElement('rt', false, 'Inline', 'Common', array('rbspan' => 'Number')); $rt->excludes = array('ruby' => true); $this->addElement('rp', false, 'Optional: #PCDATA', 'Common'); } } // vim: et sw=4 sts=4
